title.en: Objective Analysis of CPU Architecture Types, Software Impact, and Process Scale
title.zh: CPU 架构类型、软件影响与制程尺度的客观分析

summary.en: A systematic analysis of CPU architecture concepts, instruction set architecture, microarchitecture, ABI, x86, Arm, RISC-V, compiler backends, binary compatibility, memory models, endianness, network serialization, semiconductor process scaling, transistor density, power consumption, heat dissipation, and the real boundaries of process-size reduction.
summary.zh: 系统分析 CPU 架构概念、指令集架构、微架构、ABI、x86、Arm、RISC-V、编译器后端、二进制兼容、内存模型、字节序、网络序列化、半导体制程缩放、晶体管密度、功耗、散热，以及制程尺寸减小的真实边界。

readingDirection.en: Read this when understanding CPU architecture differences, compiler target behavior, binary compatibility, ABI and memory model constraints, cross-architecture network serialization, or the real performance and cost boundaries of semiconductor process scaling.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在理解 CPU 架构差异、编译器目标平台行为、二进制兼容、ABI 与内存模型约束、跨架构网络序列化，或半导体制程缩放的真实性能与成本边界时阅读。
